name: Action-Adventure
description: Classic action-adventure games: top-down exploration with castles, keys, labyrinths, dragons. Atari Adventure, Zelda-likes, and their spiritual descendants. The 'adventure' keyword is intentionally paired with motif keywords here because 'adventure' alone is too generic in English.
keywordNote: Legacy keyword-tree required 'adventure' + one of {castle, labyrinth, dragon, dungeon, atari, zelda}. The LLM classifier (Phase GC.P3) will make that nuance by semantic understanding instead of compound-keyword rules.
